title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude AI was used to transform neurological and physiological data from Formula 1 drivers and their teams into real-time visual patterns during the Monaco Grand Prix. The visualizations were displayed on drivers' helmets, race suits, and garage displays as part of the "Pattern of Thought" project created with Williams Racing and Atlassian.
